choice: v1 tax model: real progressive federal brackets (configurable filing status, default MFJ) with standard deduction, applied to ordinary income (tax-deferred withdrawals + taxable income streams); bracket thresholds indexed along each trial's simulated inflation path. State tax is a single flat configurable rate. Capital-gains/basis tracking on post-tax withdrawals is OUT of v1 (known optimism, flagged).
rationale: Flat 42.6% was the Excel's biggest distortion; effective rates in retirement are far lower. State brackets are low-value maintenance. User confirmed.
